ModMetaData.name: Vanilla Expanded Outposts - Better GUI
ModMetaData.author: Zoorackzoos
ModMetaData.description:
Replaces the small dropdown menus for adding and removing pawns from Vanilla Outposts Expanded outposts with a scrollable trade-screen style GUI.
Select multiple pawns at once, see their top skills at a glance, and use Select All / Deselect All for large colonies.
This mod also fixes a layering bug with the current item trade GUI when you're trading items between a caravan and a outpost. The bug itself was, if you had too many item rows, too much different stuff. Then the rows would go below into the "cancel", "reset" and "confirm" buttons.
Requires: Vanilla Expanded Framework + Vanilla Outposts Expanded.
